allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\('farmers_heart.json', encoding='utf-8-sig'\)\); print\('Valid JSON, inkVersion:', data['inkVersion']\)")

Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/projects | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for p in data:
    if 'ink' in p['name']:
        print\(json.dumps\(p, indent=2\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('C:/code/ifhub/projects/ink-story/play.html', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
start = content.index\('var storyContent = '\) + len\('var storyContent = '\)
depth = 0
i = start
while i < len\(content\):
    if content[i] == '{': depth += 1
    elif content[i] == '}': 
        depth -= 1
        if depth == 0:
            end = i + 1
            break
    i += 1
json_str = content[start:end]
try:
    data = json.loads\(json_str\)
    print\(f'Valid JSON, inkVersion={data.get\(\\"inkVersion\\"\)}'\)
except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
    print\(f'INVALID JSON: {e}'\)
")

")

import subprocess, sys, os
SCRIPT_DIR = os.path.dirname\(os.path.abspath\('tools/dashboard.py'\)\)
NEW_PROJECT_PY = os.path.join\('tools', 'new_project.py'\)
cmd = [sys.executable, NEW_PROJECT_PY, 'Test Ink', 'test-ink-dash', '--engine', 'ink']
print\('CMD:', cmd\)
r = subprocess.run\(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True\)
print\('STDOUT:', r.stdout\)
print\('STDERR:', r.stderr\)
print\('RC:', r.returncode\)
")
